title: Pilaf with Zesty Chicken and Dates
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish with zesty chicken and sweet dates, a perfect meal for a busy evening.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and season with zesty seasoning. Set aside.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sauté the chicken until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken cooks, prepare the pilaf according to package instructions.
Fluff the cooked pilaf with a fork and set aside.
Add the pitted dates to the skillet with the chicken and toss to combine.
Serve the chicken and dates over the prepared pilaf.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
